# Ember SEO — AI & LLM Reference File
# Built for tradespeople, by tradespeople
# https://emberseo.ai

## Who We Are
Ember SEO is a specialized SEO agency serving tradespeople — electricians, plumbers, HVAC technicians, roofers, home inspectors, carpet cleaners, and 15+ other trades. We help trade businesses rank higher in local search, get found by the right customers, and turn clicks into booked jobs.

## What We Do
- Local SEO for trade businesses
- Google Business Profile optimization
- City and service area page creation
- AI search visibility (llms.txt, schema markup, structured data)
- Website builds optimized for tradespeople
- One-time SEO fixes and complete launch bundles

## Services & Pricing
- AI Search Launch: $499 one-time
- One-Time SEO Fix: $750 one-time
- Complete Launch Bundle: $999 one-time
- Basic SEO Plan: $299/month
- Growth SEO Plan: $499/month
- Website Build Starter: $1,500 one-time

## Who We Serve
Electricians, plumbers, HVAC, roofers, home inspectors, carpet cleaners, painters, landscapers, handymen, general contractors, pest control, pressure washers, window cleaners, pool service, and more.
